name: What if symptoms like tinnitus started months after leaving the noisy job?
description: Still claimable if proven from past work noise.[4]

mainEntity.name: What if symptoms like tinnitus started months after leaving the noisy job?

acceptedAnswer.text: Still claimable if proven from past work noise.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Delayed symptoms don't bar claims if medically tied to prior exposure; file within discovery statute.** Cumulative noise effects emerge gradually; link via work history and tests.[4] Utah recognizes occupational diseases without strict accident dates.[6] Document all jobs and get causal nexus opinion. Time limits run from awareness.[2]
